name: frontier_pyramid
description: Battle Pyramid hall end-to-end (q.side_frontier_hall stage 6) — RE-CUT for the FrontierManager gauntlet (2026-07-19): the hall no longer has dialog battle buttons. Brandon's 'Enter the dark' button fires 'cobblemon-initiative frontier pyramid start'; the manager heals ONCE at the door then chains Marco -> Priya -> Brandon ~2-3s apart with NO heals between, and a loss resets the gauntlet. Pyramid fights are lock=0 (REAL fights vs the authored teams, not flattened clones) and pay the authored purses (800/800/3000, restored 2026-07-19 after the zero-payout friction flag) — the waits still ride the manager's chat beats + defeat-tag rcon asserts, NOT the '[Frontier] Purse paid' lines, so the purse restore does not shift any wait. The two 'It kneels.' waits are duplicate lines: each is preceded by a 'dev bot battlestate' probe (an EMITTER — it re-opens the wait_chat window past the previous match, and dumps stall evidence into the transcript). Fights auto-dispatch server-side under dev-bot autobattle; the manager sets the exact same tags the old onwin chain did (defeated_pyramid_challenger_1/2, defeated_frontier_brain_pyramid, frontier_pyramid_cleared) so every beaten lane and the hall_cleared chain ('A Frontier hall falls.' + #halls recount) still fire. The 'Enter the dark' button RENDERING is the champion-gate assert (compiles to PLAYER_TAG royal_league_champion + no_frontier_pyramid_cleared). Win waits ride the KNOWN intermittent TBCS stall (~50% family) + the ~1/10 showdown engine wedge: a timeout there is almost certainly the stall, not a pyramid regression - re-run before filing.

steps.comment: -- SITE NOTES: all three bodies are latch-placed (no uuid) on the shipped RCT frontier plateau anchors - Marco [3812.5 159 2976.5], Priya [3818.5 159 2976.5], Brandon [3815.5 159 2982.5]. The y=159 cluster has NEVER been ground-verified live (Frontier memory: 'coords/atlas + runtime smoke pending'), hence _probe_pending on the tp; do NOT guess a corrected Y. The frontier_active region tick (AABB x3760-3840 y150-195 z2945-3015) suspends Nuzlocke faint mechanics here - safe exhibition, but NOT a SafeZone: mobs still spawn and still hurt the hardcore player, hence day + regen below. Manager fights dispatch AT THE PLAYER (invisible anchor stands ~2b out, swept on battle end), so standing at Brandon's door is all the positioning the gauntlet needs. --

-- reset (idempotent re-runs): this hall's four defeat tags, PLUS the other six hall tags + the warden latch so the aggregate asserts stay exact. The manager's alreadyBeaten guard SKIPS a chain stage whose defeat tag is present (chain wedges) - stripping them is now load-bearing for the start, not just for the asserts --
-- gate arm: champion. Stripped again at cleanup so early-game scenarios keep their non-champion recognition lanes --
-- tp BEFORE any entity-adjacent work (latch NPCs spawn within 40b; chunks must be loaded); the long settle also covers first-visit preset import --
-- leftover-state guards: close any dialog a previous scenario left open; stopbattle force-ends a stale battle (clean-player no-op; fires no event) --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative frontier pyramid abandon
steps.comment_: gauntlet-state reset (round-4 live-caught): the in-memory stage map survives across runs in one server session - a stalled giant leaves stage 2 held, and the next start RESUMES ('the dark takes you back') instead of the fresh door the scenario asserts. Abandon clears it; clean-state runs print 'Nothing holds you here' (no-op).

steps.comment: -- hardcore protection: outside any SafeZone; day + regen keeps the plateau survivable while three battles play out --

-- party reset: empty all six slots then six lv-100 Raikou - the Frontier fights at the ceiling, a junk lv-5 party stalls TBCS battle init (wheat_war lesson). Pyramid fights are lock=0 REAL fights, but Wonder Guard + Air Balloon means the team takes no damage anyway - the no-heal chain costs it nothing but PP --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon raikou level=100 ability=wonderguard held_item=cobblemon:air_balloon moves=icebeam,surf,thunderbolt,flashcannon
steps.comment_: WONDER TEAM (showrunner idea 2026-07-19, brain-fight solo-verified): pure Electric's only weakness is Ground -> Air Balloon negates it; Wonder Guard blocks everything else and the balloon never pops (nothing lands). Slot-1 Ice Beam: accurate, NO type is immune (an Electric lead vs enemy Ground-types would zero-damage-loop under first-legal-move autobattle).

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon raikou level=100 ability=wonderguard held_item=cobblemon:air_balloon moves=icebeam,surf,thunderbolt,flashcannon
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon raikou level=100 ability=wonderguard held_item=cobblemon:air_balloon moves=icebeam,surf,thunderbolt,flashcannon

execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon raikou level=100 ability=wonderguard held_item=cobblemon:air_balloon moves=icebeam,surf,thunderbolt,flashcannon

steps.comment_: cross-scenario attrition guard (live-caught 2026-07-18: fights entered with fainted leads make autobattle pass turns forever = endless slow loss). The manager door-heal covers the chain; this covers the walk TO the door.

steps.comment: -- frontier residue strip (2026-07-18): failed runs skip cleanup, so cleared/defeat tags leak across attempts and reroute gated entries (the 'open Warden door' false alarm) --

-- brain latch re-arm (2026-07-19): a consumed fight leaves the brain BODY gone with #amb=1 — every later run finds nothing (all 7 brains were bodiless by round 4; three scenarios then false-matched STALE buffer win lines). Kill any stale body + reset the latch; the 40b approach respawns him fresh. --

-- leaked-battle sweep (2026-07-19): an aborted prior scenario can leave a live battle + a dead manager dispatch entry; stopbattle ends the battle (harmless no-op when clean) and the sleep lets the Java self-heal clear the dead dispatch (~2s) before the first hall command --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative dev bot autobattle on

steps.comment: -- settle: the band_tags tick must re-derive the no_* inverses after the removals above (Easy NPC ignores NOT_EQUALS; every not_tag gate reads a no_ band tag) --
-- beat 1: the door. Brandon's default entry rotates; assert the stable 'Enter the dark' button - its RENDERING is the champion + not-cleared gate assert --

-- beat 2: start the gauntlet. The button closes the dialog itself (command + close actions); the defensive close guards the stale-screen class anyway. The manager heals once, warns, then chains fight 1 after ~2s --

steps.comment_: defensive: a stale screen eats the next interact (live-caught arcade/factory/port)

steps.comment: -- fight 1 (Marco, auto-dispatched, purse-less): battlestate probe = EMITTER (re-opens the chat window past the door line BEFORE the fight can end) + stall evidence in the transcript. 'It kneels.' is the manager's win beat; the defeat tag is the authoritative assert --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative dev bot battlestate

steps.comment: -- fight 2 (Priya, chains ~3s after fight 1): the probe emitter moves the window past fight 1's identical 'It kneels.' - without it the duplicate line false-matches instantly --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative dev bot battlestate

steps.comment: -- fight 3 (Brandon, 'The giant wakes.'): completion line is unique; then the manager's tag grants + hall_cleared chain ('A Frontier hall falls.' actionbar + #halls recount) --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative dev bot battlestate

steps.wait_chat: The three ancients kneel and the giant with them.

steps.comment: -- beat 4: the beaten lane - re-open shows the priority-20 entry; prose any-of covers all four rotating say lines (three originals + the folded win_line). Re-find refreshes the approach context (the battle chain pushed the last one out of range) --

expect_screen_text: You beat the stones and you did it in the dark. Few can. I dug the Regis out of the deep years ago, back when this place still had an owner. It has no owner now, and neither, I think, do you - not anymore.
The bottom of the pyramid is yours. I half-know that face of yours from a long time gone. I will not say from where. Down here the dark does not ask names, and I have learned not to either.
Champion of the whole climb. The old stones bowed to your torch. Whatever you were before you walked in here stays walled in the dark with them. Go on up to the light.
You held your light to the very bottom. The Pyramid is yours, Champion - and so is whatever the dark down here was keeping for you.

steps.comment: -- cleanup: autobattle off; strip champion + everything this run earned (incl. the manager's defeated_frontier_brain_pyramid, new vs the old onwin cut) so later scenarios inherit an early-game player (wheat_war/safari assume non-champion recognition lanes) --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative dev bot autobattle off
